name: Artemether Lumefentarine Tablets
about: Artemether Lumefentarine Tablets are a type of general medicine that is used to treat malaria. This medication is commonly used in India and comes in a solid tablet form. The dosage of this medication should be taken as per the suggestion of a healthcare professional. It is important to store these tablets in a dry place to ensure their effectiveness.

faq.a: Artemether Lumefentarine Tablets are used to treat malaria.
